front.title: Key Relay Mapping for the Extensible Provisioning Protocol

abstract.t:
This document describes an Extensible Provisioning Protocol (EPP) extension mapping for the purpose of relaying DNSSEC key material from one registrar to another. The mapping introduces "<keyrelay>" as a new command in EPP.
This command will help facilitating a transfer of a domain while keeping DNSSEC's chain of trust intact.
